title: Crocodile Reaches the Tomb
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on crocodile reaches the tomb, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Reaches the Tomb. Crocodile drags the conflict toward the royal tomb and the truth of Pluton while Robin watches the plan unfold. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'll build that town so it'll help make this country better than before!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You idiot! Why did you shoot Kouza!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What's with this sudden cloud of sand!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I can't see ahead at all!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: It's useless! We Baroque Works agents have infiltrated both sides!

summary: This part develops crocodile reaches the tomb and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
